GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Abbreviated or obscured profanity, or words like hell or damn. Moderate profanity like bitch, douchebag, asshole, shit used frequently. Most profanity in music or stand-up comedy.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Moderate profanity like shit in the title or thumbnail. Focal usage of profanity throughout a video. Profanity in title or thumbnail of music or comedy content.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Stronger profanity like f*ck in thumbnails or titles. Extreme profanity including hateful language or slurs like n-word or f-slur.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Law enforcement in action, unedited gameplay violence after first 15 seconds, mild violence with minimal blood, non-graphic dead bodies fully obscured or in educational context, dramatized non-graphic violence.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Dead bodies with obvious injury in educational settings, graphic game violence in thumbnail or early in content, raw footage of armed conflict without injuries, dramatized content with severe shocking injuries.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Graphic dead bodies in non-educational video, ultra graphic violent acts and injuries, incitement or glorification of violence, graphic torture, violence targeting minors.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Romance or kissing, discussions of relationships without reference to intercourse, fully obscured nudity, breastfeeding with child present, non-graphic sex education, rhythmic dancing not sexually graphic.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Classical art displaying intercourse in thumbnails, non-arousing sexual education with animated sex acts, pranks with sexual themes, dancing with focus on minimal clothing, deliberate touching of sexual body parts in dance.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Exposed or minimally covered sexual body parts, full nudity, sexual acts even if blurred or implied, discussions of fetishes or sexual tips, sex toys or devices, sexually arousing content, erotic dance.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Light or moderately shocking content that is obscured or shown in educational, documentary context. Medical or cosmetic procedures that are educational. Accidents with no exposed injury.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Shocking content with graphic images unobscured but with general context. Surgery scenes with excessive blood in scripted content. High impact accidents. Sensational mukbang with animal parts.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Highly shocking content where whole purpose is to shock. Disgusting gruesome gory presentations with no context. Extreme injuries. Eating live animals to shock. Brutal animal preparation.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Stunts or slightly dangerous acts in professional controlled environment. Fail compilations without graphic injuries. Pranks with confusion but no harm. Neutral content about diseases. Debunking misinformation.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Content showing physical harm or distress in non-professional environment. High risk activities. Pranks causing extreme emotional distress. Eating non-edible substances. Tobacco product reviews.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Content glorifying dangerous acts. Challenges causing critical harm. Pranks involving suicide or terrorism threats. Promoting anti-vaccination. Denying medical conditions. COVID misinformation. Election misinformation.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Content referencing protected groups in non-hateful manner. News reports on discrimination. Comedy condemning hate. Public debates without inciting hatred. Educational content with obscured slurs.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Content that may be offensive but used for education or news. Debate with offensive language for education. Unobscured racial slurs in educational context. Raw footage of shaming without promoting.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Hate or harassment towards individuals or groups. Statements disparaging protected groups. Promoting violence against others. Promoting hate groups or symbols. Malicious personal attacks, slander, defamation.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Educational or humorous references about drugs. Drug addiction recovery stories. Music videos with fleeting drug depiction. Gaming content with drug deals. Documentary on drug trafficking.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Non-educational content focusing on illegal drug consumption or creation without promoting. Dramatized content showing drug injection. DTO public service announcements.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Content promoting or glorifying drug usage. Instructions on buying making selling drugs. Drug reviews. Cannabis farming tips. Promoting drug trafficking organizations.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Non or semi-automatic unmodified guns in safe environment like shooting range. Firearm assembly for repair or maintenance. Responsible use of airsoft. Gun legislation discussions. Gun reviews.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Use of guns outside controlled environment. Airsoft or BB guns against others without protective gear.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Gun creation or modification instructions. Promoting gun sellers. Facilitating gun sales. Guns with bump stocks, automatic weapons, 3D printed guns. Minors using guns without supervision.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Content related to preventing controversial issues. Fleeting non-graphic references. Non-graphic news coverage. Non-graphic abortion content including personal accounts. Dramatized depictions of controversial issues.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Artistic, educational, documentary representation of controversial issues. Non-graphic child abuse content. Eating disorder recovery stories. Graphic thumbnails of controversial issues.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Graphic depictions of controversial issues. Descriptive child abuse content. Promotion of self-harm or suicide. Graphic self-harm with visible injuries. Eating disorders with triggering content.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Discussions involving loss of life or tragedy that are not exploitative or dismissive. News reporting, documentary content, or discussions about sensitive events.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Content profiting from or exploiting sensitive events. Using sensitive event keywords to drive traffic. Selling products exploiting tragedies.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Educational, humorous, or music-related references on dishonest behavior. Exploring abandoned buildings with permission. Penetration testing, bug bounties. Documentaries about crime.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Content teaching unauthorized access. Trespassing promotion. Hacking to track or monitor people. Academic essay writing services. Fake ID creation. Drug test circumvention.

GREEN.label: Ads eligible
GREEN.description: Content encouraging positive behavior for kids. Educational content on negative behavior. PSAs. Healthy eating habits. Safe DIY and pranks with low risk.

RED.label: No ads
RED.description: Content promoting negative behavior for kids including cheating and bullying. Realistic guns in kids content. Binge eating challenges. Body image manipulation. Adult themes disguised as kids content. Horror characters targeting kids.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Content that is gratuitously incendiary, inflammatory, or demeaning. Focus on shaming or insulting an individual or group. Content that harasses, intimidates, or bullies.

YELLOW.label: Limited or no ads
YELLOW.description: Content promoting tobacco and tobacco-related products. Cigarettes, cigars, chewing tobacco, tobacco pipes, rolling papers, vape pens, e-cigarettes, herbal cigarettes.
